documentation.description:
(*) All Trademarks mentioned are properties of their respective owners.

simple_types.name: Kind_Of_Code
simple_types.code:
type Kind_Of_Code is
  (Code_128,
   Code_MSI,
   Code_UPCA,
   Code_EAN13,
   Code_DM_Rectangular,
   Code_DM_Square,
   Code_QR_Low,
   Code_QR_Medium,
   Code_QR_Quartile,
   Code_QR_High);

enumeration_literals.name: Code_MSI
enumeration_literals.description: UPC-A / EAN-13 are 1D bar codes used on labels of retail products.

enumeration_literals.name: Code_EAN13
enumeration_literals.description:
Data Matrix is a 2D bar code popular for marking small items.
Standard: ISO/IEC 16022:2006

enumeration_literals.name: Code_DM_Square
enumeration_literals.description:
QR (for "Quick Response") is a popular 2D bar code.
Standard: ISO/IEC 18004:2015.

enumeration_literals.name: Code_QR_Low
enumeration_literals.description: Level L (Low)       7% of codewords can be restored.

enumeration_literals.name: Code_QR_Medium
enumeration_literals.description: Level M (Medium)   15% of codewords can be restored.

enumeration_literals.name: Code_QR_Quartile
enumeration_literals.description: Level Q (Quartile) 25% of codewords can be restored.

enumeration_literals.name: Code_QR_High
enumeration_literals.description: Level H (High)     30% of codewords can be restored.

record_types.name: Box
record_types.code: type Box is record left, bottom, width, height : Real; end record;

record_types.name: Module_Box
record_types.code: type Module_Box is record left, bottom, width, height : Natural; end record;

tagged_types.name: Bar_Code
tagged_types.code: type Bar_Code is abstract tagged private;

subtypes.name: Code_1D
subtypes.code: subtype Code_1D is Kind_Of_Code range Kind_Of_Code'First .. Code_EAN13;

subtypes.name: Code_2D
subtypes.code: subtype Code_2D is Kind_Of_Code range Code_DM_Rectangular .. Kind_Of_Code'Last;

subtypes.name: Code_DM
subtypes.code: subtype Code_DM is Kind_Of_Code range Code_DM_Rectangular .. Code_DM_Square;

subtypes.name: Code_QR
subtypes.code: subtype Code_QR is Kind_Of_Code range Code_QR_Low .. Code_QR_High;

subtypes.name: Code_UPCA_EAN13
subtypes.code: subtype Code_UPCA_EAN13 is Kind_Of_Code range Code_UPCA .. Code_EAN13;

subprograms.name: Draw
subprograms.code: procedure Draw (bc : in out Bar_Code; kind : Kind_Of_Code; text : String)

subprograms.name: Fitting
subprograms.code: function Fitting (kind : Kind_Of_Code; text : String) return Module_Box

subprograms.name: Img
subprograms.code: function Img (x : Real; prec : Positive := Real'Digits) return String

subprograms.name: Set_Bounding_Box
subprograms.code: procedure Set_Bounding_Box (bc : in out Bar_Code; bounding : Box)
